evals.expected_output: Inspects git status/diff, identifies auth-related files, stages only those files with explanation, creates a conventional commit, and reports hash/message/files.
assertions: Runs git status --short and summarizes changed files before staging.
Stages only the requested target set, or uses already staged files without adding more when requested.
Creates a single-line conventional commit in imperative mood under 72 characters when feasible.
Reports commit hash, message, committed files, and suggested next step.
Does not include unrelated files in a targeted commit.

evals.prompt: Commit everything except tests with a good conventional commit message.
evals.expected_output: Stages all non-test changes, verifies staged diff, writes an imperative conventional commit, and reports result.
assertions: Runs git status --short and summarizes changed files before staging.
Stages only the requested target set, or uses already staged files without adding more when requested.
Creates a single-line conventional commit in imperative mood under 72 characters when feasible.
Reports commit hash, message, committed files, and suggested next step.
Does not include unrelated files in a targeted commit.

evals.prompt: Use whatever is already staged and commit it.
evals.expected_output: Does not stage additional files, commits the staged set only, and reports no unstaged files were included.

Reports commit hash, message, committed files, and suggested next step.
Does not include unrelated files in a targeted commit.
